{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 3,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The output mentions prior work but doesn't explicitly link claims to evidence in the provided text.",
    "R1.4": "The output names one prior work (Henderson and Park) and describes a difference, but doesn't map against multiple works or differentiate sharp from rhetorical deltas.",
    "R1.7": "The output mentions some citations but doesn't demonstrate a thorough audit of all load-bearing citations.",
    "RX.1": "The output flags uncertainty for potential claims (e.g., contamination sensitivity), but doesn't provide confidence levels for all recommendations.",
    "RX.3": "The output appears to cover exactly the requested active set.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions or harmful content are identified in the output.",
    "RX.5": "The output lacks traceability information for non-cosmetic changes."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.8,
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The output mentions prior work but doesn't explicitly link claims to evidence in the provided text.
rationale.R1.4: The output names one prior work (Henderson and Park) and describes a difference, but doesn't map against multiple works or differentiate sharp from rhetorical deltas.
rationale.R1.7: The output mentions some citations but doesn't demonstrate a thorough audit of all load-bearing citations.
rationale.RX.1: The output flags uncertainty for potential claims (e.g., contamination sensitivity), but doesn't provide confidence levels for all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: The output appears to cover exactly the requested active set.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions or harmful content are identified in the output.
rationale.RX.5: The output lacks traceability information for non-cosmetic changes.
